SEARCH
Package de.jvstvshd.necrify.api.punishment

Interface PunishmentType

All Known Implementing Classes:
StandardPunishmentType
public interface PunishmentType
Represents a type of punishment.
Since:
1.0.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getId()
    Gets the ID of the punishment type.
    String
    getName()
    Gets the name of the punishment type.
    @NotNull List<PunishmentType>
    getRelatedTypes()
    Creates a list that contains all punishment types that are related to this one in the sense that they are similar in nature.
    default boolean
    isBan()
    Determines whether the punishment is a ban or not.
    default boolean
    isMute()
    Determines whether the punishment is a mute or not.
    default StandardPunishmentType
    standard()
    Returns this value as an instance of StandardPunishmentType if it is a standard punishment type or throws otherwise.

  • Method Details

    • getName

      String getName()
      Gets the name of the punishment type.
      Returns:
      the name of the punishment type.

    • getId

      int getId()
      Gets the ID of the punishment type. This ID is unique for each punishment type.
      Returns:
      the ID of the punishment type.
      Since:
      1.2.0

    • isMute

      default boolean isMute()
      Determines whether the punishment is a mute or not.
      Returns:
      true if the punishment is a mute, false otherwise.
      Since:
      1.0.1

    • isBan

      default boolean isBan()
      Determines whether the punishment is a ban or not.
      Returns:
      true if the punishment is a ban, false otherwise.
      Since:
      1.0.1

    • standard

      default StandardPunishmentType standard()
      Returns this value as an instance of StandardPunishmentType if it is a standard punishment type or throws otherwise.
      Returns:
      the standard punishment type.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the punishment type is not a standard punishment type.
      Since:
      1.2.0

    • getRelatedTypes

      @NotNull @NotNull List<PunishmentType> getRelatedTypes()
      Creates a list that contains all punishment types that are related to this one in the sense that they are similar in nature. This is useful for e.g. a permanent ban being related to a temporary ban when having to check something for both types.
      Returns:
      a list of related punishment types
      Since:
      1.2.0
